title: Peppery Syrian Cheese Crumble
description: This crumble is a savory and slightly peppery dish featuring liquid cheese, perfect for breakfast or as a snack. It's egg-free-friendly and reminiscent of nostalgic Syrian cuisine.

ingredients.name: 1 cup ricotta cheese
ingredients.notes: can also use similar cheeses like feta or paneer

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
ingredients.notes: ensure it's freshly squeezed for best flavor

ingredients.name: 2 teaspoons ground cumin
ingredients.notes: optional, adds a warm, earthy note

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: for garnish, can be omitted if not preferred

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: optional, add a pinch for seasoning

instructions: Combine ricotta cheese with lemon juice, cumin (if using), and salt in a mixing bowl until well combined.
Fold in the finely chopped parsley gently to avoid breaking up the cheese too much.
Shape into small crumbles and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or non-stick mat.
Preheat oven to 200°C (392°F). Bake for about 15-20 minutes, until golden brown and crisp on the edges.
Serve warm as a snack or appetizer. Can be stored in an airtight container for up to 4 days.
